description_long: This shotgun features a robust, metallic construction with a predominantly black and gold color scheme. The barrel is elongated and cylindrical, with two parallel tubes suggesting a double-barrel configuration, and the muzzle end is clearly visible from the front. The receiver and action area are blocky and angular, with mechanical detailing and a visible sight or scope mount on top. The grip and trigger area are compact, with a squared-off trigger guard and a short, stubby handle, lacking a traditional full stock. The overall design is modern and tactical, with reinforced elements and a sleek, industrial finish. The shotgun appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some polymer or composite components for the grip and possibly the fore-end.
description: A modern, black and gold double-barrel shotgun with a compact grip, squared trigger guard, and industrial detailing. The design is robust and tactical, with visible mechanical features and a sleek finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated double barrels, blocky receiver, and compact grip with gold and black coloration.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the squared, compact muzzle profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same double-barrel structure, mechanical details, and the sight mount on top.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the squared trigger guard, and the compact handle.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with parallel tubes and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, compact trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
